rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue as before; no qualitative change affecting Poland's security or energy situation — all events are continuations or distant noise. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli strikes on Beirut continue without qualitative escalation; indirect energy price volatility risk remains but no new development for Poland.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU-Ukraine accession talks advancing formally, a mild positive signal for Poland's eastern neighborhood but no qualitative leap beyond known trajectory.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large bilateral trade deal between UK and Japan; minimal direct impact on Poland's economy or daily life.
